children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Administrator shall biennially submit a report of operations under this chapter to the President for submission to the Congress.

children.heading: Effects of flood insurance program
children.label: b Effects of flood insurance program
children.text: The Administrator shall include, as part of the biennial report submitted under subsection (a), a chapter reporting on the effects on the flood insurance program observed through implementation of requirements under the Riegle Community Development and Regulatory Improvement Act of 1994.
